name: bridgistic
description: Connect Claude to WordPress safely: signed requests, scoped keys, approvals, audit logs, and snapshots.
long_description:
Bridgistic is a safe bridge between Claude and your WordPress site. Instead of a full-admin Application Password, you mint a scoped key in the free Bridgistic WordPress plugin; this extension runs the local MCP server that signs every request with it. The plugin verifies signatures (HMAC-SHA256 with replay protection), enforces the key's scopes, queues destructive operations for human approval, snapshots before risky writes, and records a full audit log.

Setup: install the Bridgistic WordPress plugin on your site, open WP Admin → Bridgistic → Claude Setup, create a key (the secret is shown once), then enter your site URL, key ID, and secret below.

site_url.title: WordPress Site URL
site_url.description: Your site address exactly as shown in WP Admin → Settings → General, e.g. https://example.com

key_id.title: Bridgistic Key ID
key_id.description: Public key id (wpk_…) from WP Admin → Bridgistic → Claude Setup.

key_secret.title: Bridgistic Key Secret
key_secret.description: Secret (wps_…) shown once when the key was created. Stored securely by Claude Desktop.

tools.name: bridgistic_get_site_info
tools.description: Read the site's stack: versions, theme, plugins, detected frameworks

tools.name: bridgistic_list_posts
tools.description: List posts, pages, and custom post types

tools.name: bridgistic_snapshot_create
tools.description: Take a reversible snapshot before risky changes
